# Karadev

> AI-powered collaborative development platform — connect GitHub repos, chat with a codebase-aware AI, and collaborate with your team.

Karadev gives engineering teams a shared AI teammate that understands their actual code. It connects to GitHub, lets teams chat with AI about their repositories, tracks tasks, and shares prompt libraries across the workspace.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, and how Karadev works.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Acceptable use, accounts, and liability.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How Karadev handles user data and code context.
